texto: Tree' is the title of a dance, is the cadence of a song. The black silhouette is only a moment of stillness caught by the shutter of the eye. It is finely tuned to the harmonics of the air. It loves both the sun and the wind and is let turn towards its beloved and so become itself.This is the dance of all living things. This is why endangered peoples say if they have their dance they will never die.
explicacao: Citação de Amanda Fieldsend sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Tree' is the title of a dance, is the cadence of a song. The black silhouette is only a moment of…” articula reflexao, dance, love em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e love.
